1.label: Momentary Click
1.description: Triggered through a momentary switch click, or a toggle switch position change.

2.label: Momentary Hold
2.description: Triggered through a momentary switch hold. Inactive when toggle switches are used or in gate mode.

paramInformation.label: Reports Type
paramInformation.description: Should be set to 1 if the module operates in Venetian blind mode

options.label: Blind position reports sent using Z-Wave commands
Blind position reports sent using Fibaro commands

paramInformation.label: Turning Time/Delay Time
paramInformation.description: Time of full turn of the lamellas in Venetian blind mode, or countdown time after which an open gate starts closing in gate mode

options.label: Controller, momentary switch, or limit switch
Controller, momentary switch, limit switch, or stop frame

paramInformation.label: Switch Type
paramInformation.description: Relevant for roller blind mode and Venetian blind mode

paramInformation.label: Delay Time After S2
paramInformation.description: Time to turn off relays after reaching a limit switch, or gate closing delay after the S2 contact has been disconnected

paramInformation.label: Motor Operation Detection
paramInformation.description: Power threshold to be interpreted as reaching a limit switch

paramInformation.label: Motor Operation Time
paramInformation.description: Time period for the motor to continue operation

paramInformation.label: Forced Roller Shutter Calibration
paramInformation.description: Setting to 1 starts the calibration process. Relevant only in positioning modes.

paramInformation.label: Response to Smoke, CO, CO2 Alarm
Managing Lamellas in Response to Alarm
paramInformation.description: Determines how the lamellas react upon alarm detection in Venetian blind mode

options.label: Set lamellas to their extreme position

paramInformation.label: Power Reports
paramInformation.description: Power level change that will result in a new power value report, as a percentage of the previous report

paramInformation.label: Energy Reports
paramInformation.description: Energy level change that will result in a new energy value report

paramInformation.label: Self-Measurement
paramInformation.description: Include power and energy used by the device itself in reports sent to the main controller

paramInformation.label: Scenes/Associations Activation
paramInformation.description: Determines whether scenes or associations are activated by the switch keys

metadata.inclusion:
1. Connect the power supply.
2. Set the main controller into the learn mode (see the controller's manual).
3. Triple click the B-button or a push button connected to the S1 terminal.
metadata.exclusion:
1. Make sure the module is connected to the power supply.
2. Set the main controller into the learn mode (see the controller's manual).
3. Triple click the B-button or a push button connected to the S1 terminal.
metadata.reset:
1. Make sure the module is connected to the power supply.
2. Press and hold the B-button for ca. 14 seconds.
3. LED indicator will glow yellow.
4. Release the B-button and press it again, briefly.
5. The Roller Shutter memory is now empty and the module goes into the auto inclusion mode.
